title: Cobblemon LuckPerms NPC Compat
description: This mod adds compatibility for Cobblemon NPCs to interact with the LuckPerms Permissions API.
body:
# Cobblemon LuckPerms NPC Compat
This mod adds compatibility for Cobblemon NPCs to interact with the LuckPerms Permissions API. ## Requirements - [Matthiesen Lib API](https://modrinth.com/mod/matthiesen-lib-api) - [Cobblemon 1.7.3+](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - [Luckperms 5.4](https://modrinth.com/mod/luckperms) ## Docs Documentation for this mod can be found at [mods.matthiesen.dev](https://mods.matthiesen.dev/cobblemon-luckperms-npc-compat/) ## Version Compatibility | Minecraft Version | Mod Version | |-------------------|-------------| | 1.21.1 | 1.x.x | ## License MIT - see `LICENSE`.
